description: Example skill-rules config. Each entry maps a skill name to keywords that should trigger a suggestion. Polish diacritics are normalized automatically — 'karuzelę' matches 'karuzele'.

create-carousel.description: Generate a LinkedIn/Instagram carousel (image deck). Use when planning a multi-slide post.

write-linkedin-post.description: Draft a LinkedIn post in your voice.

inbox-triage.description: Run morning inbox triage — important vs trash, calendar hits, reply drafts.

schedule-meeting.description: Create a calendar event via your calendar integration.

write-newsletter.description: Compose a newsletter issue — used for your own voice, not daily AI-news summaries.
